name: Amazoom Blimp Jockey '69
short_description: A 2D Shoot-Em-Up with a focus on crew management, exploration, procedural generation, and corporate espionage.
detailed_description:
Pilot a variety of airships through dangerous cities, caves, forests, and more to deliver packages, collect items, earn credits, expand your crew, and experience the drama of climbing the corporate ladder in a megacompany.

Inspired by retro classics, sidescrolling shoot-em-ups, and more modern twinstick shooters, Amazoom Blimp Jockey '69 delivers a fast-paced blend of exploration, combat, and corporate espionage.

In the wake of the Retail War, the only corporation left is Amazoom.

Fortified cities and underground bunkers are the last remaining bastions of society. Old service tunnels and derelict neighborhoods have become stomping grounds for mutated creatures and violent gangs. Unsupervised war machines wander the landscape in search of new targets. Leftover minefields and killnets from the previous conflict are still armed.

You've been drafted into Amazoom's Pilot Corps to help deliver packages to survivors. Today is your first day on the job!

Learn to fly increasingly sophisticated and dangerous shuttles, haulers, and blimps, recruit specialists and contractors into your crew, get your cargo to its destination by any means necessary, and you might just earn enough credits to purchase an early retirement.

Amazoom Blimp Jockey '69 tells a story about corporatocracy, nepotism, espionage, machine guns, and teamwork.

Your depot supervisor will fill you in on the rest.
